name: James Sunderland [✵] Silent Hill 2
description:
SPOILERS

AND LORE

FOR SILENT HILL 2!!!

5 years after his attempted suicide and the nightmare of Silent Hill James lives alone in a small town in Washington intent on wallowing in his grief and remorse until he inevitably dies...AnyPOV, user not mentioned, make shit up fam

4AM RANDOM BOT 🎉🇺🇸😜 (i use all my writing brain juice for other chat and stories and have barely anything left for my account and own bots)

For this bot i had trouble finding an interesting idea so i decided to look into the James lore and see what stuck. I ended up mixing together the canon vague ending of James just 'disapearing' (leaving/going into hiding) and the 'In Water' ending which most of the writers felt was the "real" ending.

James is 34 and I did put pathetic in his desc lmao

Its weird how i only just recently played the og SH2 but have like weird nostalgia for it and the remake which is very cool btw (they still should've remade 3 first name shit is fire)

I'd apologize for yapping both here and the intro but I don't care and it will happen again >_0
creator: Lovely_Me
